items.title: King Charles gets ovation for Congress speech warning of volatile world
items.raw_content: He tells US lawmakers his address comes the two nations' relationship is "more important" than ever "in times of great uncertainty".
items.ai_summary: 查尔斯国王在美国国会演讲，强调在动荡时期英美关系的重要性。

items.title: Musk accuses Altman of stealing a charity as courtroom battle begins
items.raw_content: The case over OpenAI's history and public commitments could have major implications for the future of AI.
items.ai_summary: 马斯克指控奥特曼盗用慈善，OpenAI案开审，影响AI未来。

items.title: Former US officials criticise Pentagon silence on deadly Iran school attack
items.raw_content: In the two months since the deadly strike, the Pentagon has said only that the incident is under investigation.
items.ai_summary: 美国前官员批评五角大楼对伊朗致命校园袭击保持沉默。

items.title: Kim Jong Un praises troops who 'self-blasted' to avoid capture by Ukraine
items.raw_content: It confirms suspicions that North Korean soldiers are being told to detonate their grenades to kill themselves.
items.ai_summary: 金正恩赞扬朝军士兵为避免被乌军俘虏而“自爆”。

items.title: Five takeaways from the King's historic address to Congress
items.raw_content: There were some lines in the speech that may have buoyed Democrats – and raised eyebrows in the White House.
items.ai_summary: 国王对国会历史性演讲的部分内容令民主党振奋并引发白宫关注。

items.title: Al Fayed survivor was modern slavery victim, says Home Office
items.raw_content: Rachael Louw says she feels "vindication" and "validation" that her case has been recognised by the British government.
items.ai_summary: 英国内政部认定阿尔·法耶德性侵幸存者拉谢尔·洛为现代奴役受害者。

items.title: Wales great North to retire from rugby
items.raw_content: George North will bring down the curtain on one of the most successful careers in British professional rugby.
items.ai_summary: 乔治·诺斯宣布退役，结束辉煌的英式橄榄球职业生涯。

items.title: Chelsea captain Bright retires - what now for ex-England defender?
items.raw_content: Chelsea captain Millie Bright announces she has retired from football with immediate effect because of injury.

items.title: Afghanistan women can return to competition
items.raw_content: Afghanistan women will become a "symbol of resilience" after Fifa approved their return to international competition, says former captain Khalida Popal.
items.ai_summary: 国际足联批准阿富汗女足重返国际赛场，前队长称其为韧性象征。

items.title: Can Griezmann end his Atletico love story in style?
items.raw_content: Antoine Griezmann's long love affair with Atletico Madrid is drawing to a close, but can the Frenchman bid farewell by securing the Champions League?
